$schema._description: Event calendar per game. Update once per patch. All dates ISO YYYY-MM-DD in the game's primary server timezone.

_fields.name: Event name as it appears on the wiki
_fields.type: One of: main, web, login, combat, exploration, story
_fields.start: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when the event opens
_fields.end: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when the event closes (exclusive)
_fields.rewards: Short string summarizing notable rewards (e.g. '4★ Selector + Primogems'). Optional.
_fields.url: Wiki link to the event page. Optional.
_fields.patch: Patch number string this event belongs to. Optional.

_scrape_hints: Each wiki has an Events page listing current + upcoming events with start/end dates.
Filter to only 'ongoing' and 'upcoming' for the calendar — past events should be dropped on patch sync.
Web events live in a separate section but use the same shape — type='web'.
Daily login events are typically type='login' with low importance.

hsr.name: Trailblaze Comm: Memory
hsr.tagline: End-game combat tower with Remembrance synergies.

zzz.name: Aria Debut Trial
zzz.tagline: Test-drive Aria with a curated team.

zzz.name: Shiyu Defense: Phase 2
zzz.tagline: Bimonthly combat tower with new affixes.
